data.title: Write RED test asserting root INSTALL.md structural contract (marketplace + prereqs + onboarding) and README.md cleanup
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Purpose
Write a RED test that asserts the structural contract of the root INSTALL.md (created in the next task) and verifies README.md has been cleaned of the old ast-grep install block (Task 3). The single contract test covers both outcomes.

## File Impact
- tests/test-install-doc-contract.sh — CREATE (the test script)
- .test-index — EDIT (add RED marker)

## Implementation Steps
1. Create tests/test-install-doc-contract.sh (executable, `chmod +x`).
2. The script runs a series of assertions and exits 1 on the first failure, exits 0 only if all pass.
3. Assertions (all must pass):
   - INSTALL.md exists at repo root
   - INSTALL.md contains `## Prerequisites`, `## Installation`, `## Optional Dependencies` headings
   - INSTALL.md contains `/plugin marketplace add navapbc/digital-service-orchestra`
   - INSTALL.md contains `/plugin install dso@digital-service-orchestra`
   - INSTALL.md mentions bash 4.0 requirement
   - INSTALL.md mentions GNU coreutils
   - INSTALL.md mentions Claude Code
   - INSTALL.md references brew.sh
   - INSTALL.md links to plugins/dso/docs/CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md
   - INSTALL.md mentions /dso:onboarding with a time unit (minute or hour)
   - README.md no longer contains `brew install ast-grep` (or if it does, it's inside a block that explicitly points to INSTALL.md)
4. Verify test FAILS when run (RED — INSTALL.md doesn't exist yet).
5. Add `[test_install_doc_contract]` RED marker to `.test-index` for INSTALL.md.
6. Commit the RED test and marker together.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: plugins/dso/scripts/validate.sh --ci
- [ ] tests/test-install-doc-contract.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x tests/test-install-doc-contract.sh
- [ ] Script fails (RED) before INSTALL.md exists
  Verify: ! bash tests/test-install-doc-contract.sh
- [ ] `.test-index` contains [test_install_doc_contract] RED marker for INSTALL.md
  Verify: grep -F '[test_install_doc_contract]' .test-index
